brand_identity.name: PICT Guard
brand_identity.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority) mixed with Organic Trust
brand_identity.visual_motif: Grid Borders, Clean Glass, and Tactical Precision

headings.usage: All page titles, card headers, and modal titles. Use tracking-tight (-0.02em) for sizes above 24px.

body.usage: General content, form labels, data tables. Optimized for screen readability.

mono.usage: ID numbers, timestamps, QR code text values.

primary.description: Deep Navy / Slate 900. Used for main buttons, headers, and active states.

secondary.description: Slate 100. Used for secondary buttons and card backgrounds.

accent.description: Sky 500. Used for active links, highlights, and focus rings.

admin_dashboard.structure: Sidebar (fixed 250px) + Main Content (flex-1). Main content uses a grid of 'Grid Border' cards.
admin_dashboard.visuals: White cards with 1px slate-200 borders. No shadows (flat style).

visitor_kiosk.structure: Centered single-column flow with maximum width of 600px. Large touch targets.
visitor_kiosk.visuals: Floating 'Glass' container on a blurred campus background.

id_card_portal.structure: Mobile-first vertical stack. The ID Card is the 'Hero' element.
id_card_portal.visuals: Card should look physical—rounded-xl, slight drop-shadow-lg, inner-border.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md shadow-sm h-10 px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md h-10 px-4 py-2
buttons.destructive: bg-white text-rose-600 border border-rose-200 hover:bg-rose-50 rounded-md h-10 px-4 py-2

inputs.default: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-900 rounded-md h-10 px-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400
inputs.kiosk_large: h-14 text-lg px-4 bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:bg-white

cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 flex flex-col gap-4
cards.id_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-lg aspect-[1.586/1]

status_badges.valid: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800
status_badges.invalid: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-rose-100 text-rose-800
status_badges.pending: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-amber-100 text-amber-800

camera_module.instructions: Use 'react-webcam'. Overlay a semi-transparent guide (border-2 border-dashed border-white/50 rounded-full) to help users position their face. Add a 3-second countdown before capture.
camera_module.ui_style: Full width video feed with 'Capture' button floating at bottom.

qr_display.instructions: Use 'qrcode.react'. Display on a white square container with p-4 padding. Add 'Valid until: [Date]' text below in JetBrains Mono.
qr_display.security_watermark: Add a subtle PICT logo watermark behind the QR code.

general: Ensure all date inputs use the Shadcn 'Calendar' component (via Popover), NOT native date pickers.
For the Guard Scanner: Implement a 'Traffic Light' full-screen feedback system. Green screen = Valid, Red screen = Invalid/Expired.
Admin Dashboard charts: Use 'recharts'. Style them with 'stroke-slate-900' for lines and 'fill-blue-100' for areas.
Do NOT use 'Inter'. Use 'Public Sans' for body and 'Manrope' for headings.
accessibility: Ensure all inputs have associated labels.
Color contrast must be WCAG AA compliant (Slate-600 on Slate-50 is border-line, use Slate-700).
Keyboard navigation flow for the visitor kiosk must be linear and trap focus.
